---
title: Jupyter Notebooks
---

Here you will find Jupyter notebooks used in the course.  
Click the link to download, and then open in JupyterLab on your computer.

- [Approval Ratings: Bernoulli, Binomial, CLT, and Confidence Intervals](../classlib/classlib/notebooks/approval_rating_bernoulli_binomial_clt_ci.ipynb)

- [Bayesian Quadrature](../classlib/classlib/notebooks/Bayesian_quadrature.ipynb)

- [Health, Wealth, and Life Expectancy (Gapminder)](../classlib/classlib/notebooks/health_wealth_gapminder_regression.ipynb)

- [Exact vs CLT vs Bootstrap Confidence Interval Coverage](../classlib/classlib/notebooks/confidence_interval_exact_vs_clt_vs_bootstrap.ipynb)

- [Matched Pairs Sleep Study](../classlib/classlib/notebooks/matched_pairs_sleep_study.ipynb)
